scripts.test-project-use-local-swagger: dotnet nuget locals all --clear && dotnet package remove TypedApi.Swagger --project ./TypedApiTestProject/TypedApiTestProject.Server/TypedApiTestProject.Server.csproj || echo TypedApi.Swagger was not installed && dotnet package add TypedApi.Swagger --version 0.2.0 --project ./TypedApiTestProject/TypedApiTestProject.Server/TypedApiTestProject.Server.csproj --no-restore && dotnet restore ./TypedApiTestProject/TypedApiTestProject.Server/TypedApiTestProject.Server.csproj --configfile ./NuGet.Local.config
scripts.test-project-reset-local-swagger: npm run test-project-pack-local-swagger && npm run test-project-use-local-swagger
scripts.nuget-swagger-pack-check: npm run nuget-swagger-clean && dotnet pack ./dotnet/TypedApi.Swagger/TypedApi.Swagger.csproj -c Release --no-build
scripts.nuget-swagger-pack-local: npm run nuget-swagger-clean && dotnet pack ./dotnet/TypedApi.Swagger/TypedApi.Swagger.csproj -c Release
scripts.nuget-swagger-version:patch: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$p='./dotnet/TypedApi.Swagger/TypedApi.Swagger.csproj'; $c=Get-Content $p -Raw; $m=[regex]::Match($c, '<Version>(\d+)\.(\d+)\.(\d+)</Version>'); if(!$m.Success){ throw 'No <Version>x.y.z</Version> found'; }; $new='{0}.{1}.{2}' -f $m.Groups[1].Value,$m.Groups[2].Value,([int]$m.Groups[3].Value+1); $c=$c -replace '<Version>\d+\.\d+\.\d+</Version>',('<Version>'+$new+'</Version>'); Set-Content $p $c; Write-Host ('Version bumped to '+$new)"
scripts.nuget-swagger-version:minor: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$p='./dotnet/TypedApi.Swagger/TypedApi.Swagger.csproj'; $c=Get-Content $p -Raw; $m=[regex]::Match($c, '<Version>(\d+)\.(\d+)\.(\d+)</Version>'); if(!$m.Success){ throw 'No <Version>x.y.z</Version> found'; }; $new='{0}.{1}.0' -f $m.Groups[1].Value,([int]$m.Groups[2].Value+1); $c=$c -replace '<Version>\d+\.\d+\.\d+</Version>',('<Version>'+$new+'</Version>'); Set-Content $p $c; Write-Host ('Version bumped to '+$new)"
scripts.nuget-swagger-version:major: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$p='./dotnet/TypedApi.Swagger/TypedApi.Swagger.csproj'; $c=Get-Content $p -Raw; $m=[regex]::Match($c, '<Version>(\d+)\.(\d+)\.(\d+)</Version>'); if(!$m.Success){ throw 'No <Version>x.y.z</Version> found'; }; $new='{0}.0.0' -f ([int]$m.Groups[1].Value+1); $c=$c -replace '<Version>\d+\.\d+\.\d+</Version>',('<Version>'+$new+'</Version>'); Set-Content $p $c; Write-Host ('Version bumped to '+$new)"
scripts.nuget-swagger-publish:check: npm run nuget-swagger-build && npm run nuget-swagger-pack-check
scripts.nuget-swagger-publish:patch: npm run nuget-swagger-version:patch && npm run nuget-swagger-publish:check && npm run nuget-swagger-publish
scripts.nuget-swagger-publish:minor: npm run nuget-swagger-version:minor && npm run nuget-swagger-publish:check && npm run nuget-swagger-publish
scripts.nuget-swagger-publish:major: npm run nuget-swagger-version:major && npm run nuget-swagger-publish:check && npm run nuget-swagger-publish
scripts.test-client-update-local-package: npm run test-client-remove-local-package && npm run test-client-build-package && npm run test-client-pack-package && npm run test-client-install-local-package
scripts.test-client-full-reset: npm run test-client-update-local-package && npm run test-client-generate-api && npm run test-client-build
scripts.pack:check: cd ./npm/typed-api-client && npm run build && npm pack --dry-run
scripts.pack:local: cd ./npm/typed-api-client && npm run build && npm pack
scripts.publish:patch: npm run version:patch && npm run publish:check &&cd ./npm/typed-api-client && npm publish
scripts.publish:minor: npm run version:minor && npm run publish:check &&cd ./npm/typed-api-client && npm publish
scripts.publish:major: npm run version:major && npm run publish:check &&cd ./npm/typed-api-client && npm publish
